notes: does not want to learn; wants it done; asks for options

messages.content: you keep explaining how OAuth works but I don't care. I just need google login working

Fair enough, skipping the theory. Concretely you need three things: a Google Cloud OAuth client ID, two redirect URLs configured, and the provider block in your auth config. I can walk you through the Google Cloud console part, which has to be done in your browser.
see, 'walk you through' is exactly what I don't want. I don't want to learn this. I just want it done. what are my options?
